name: Prune Cake
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 0:15
Combine the first eight ingredients in a large mixing bowl. Add oil and eggs, beating well with an electric mixer at medium speed. Add buttermilk and vanilla, beating well. Stir in diced prunes and pecans. Pour batter into a greased and floured 10-inch tube pan. Bake at 350 degrees for 1 hour and 15 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool in the pan for 10 minutes; remove from the pan and place on a serving plate. Pour the Buttermilk Glaze over the cake while both are still warm. Yield: one 10-inch cake.
